name: studycoach
description: Coach project-local self-study sessions with a Rumsfeld Known/Unknown matrix.

interface.shortDescription: Project-local self-study roadmap and knowledge matrix
interface.longDescription: Study Coach guides diagnostic interviews, builds a Known/Unknown matrix, resumes self-study projects, and records study-session progress under a project-local .rumsfeld directory.
defaultPrompt: Use Study Coach to start a self-study project
Use Study Coach to resume studying
